title: EDEN experiment config
description: Declarative input to an EDEN experiment. Fields here are the host-mechanism-independent core: objective, evaluation schema, concurrency bound. Termination is a deployment-supplied policy (see 03-roles.md §6.2 decision-type 0); the pre-12a-3 max_variants / max_wall_time / convergence_window / target_condition fields have been removed from the normative schema (deployments MAY still carry them as additional properties — conforming implementations ignore them). Role bindings (how the ideator, executor, and evaluator are hosted — local subprocess, HTTP service, etc.) are implementation-defined and travel under additional properties; chapter 03 defines the role contracts but explicitly defers a normative role-binding representation to a future v0 addition or a v1 chapter (see 03-roles.md §6).

expr.description: Scalar expression over fields of evaluation_schema.

dispatch_mode.description: Per-decision-type gate on orchestrator-role automation; see 02-data-model.md §2.4 and 03-roles.md §6.1. The four operational keys default to 'auto'; the 'termination' key defaults to 'manual' (backward-compatible with pre-12a-3 deployments that had no termination policy). An omitted operational key is equivalent to 'auto'; an omitted 'termination' is equivalent to 'manual'. Unknown keys are tolerated and ignored by conforming implementations.

termination.description: When 'auto', the orchestrator consults the deployment-supplied termination policy each iteration (03-roles.md §6.2 decision-type 0). When 'manual' (the default), no termination policy is consulted; an operator MAY still terminate via POST /v0/experiments/{E}/terminate regardless of this flag.

ideation_creation.description: When 'auto', the orchestrator runs its ideation-creation policy. When 'manual', operators in the 'admins' group drive ideation-task creation via POST /tasks.

execution_dispatch.description: When 'auto', the orchestrator creates one execution task per ready idea. When 'manual', operators in the 'admins' or 'orchestrators' group drive execution-task creation via POST /tasks (the body MAY carry an explicit target override; otherwise idea.intended_executor is the seed).

evaluation_dispatch.description: When 'auto', the orchestrator creates one evaluation task per starting variant with commit_sha set. When 'manual', operators in the 'admins' group drive evaluation-task creation via POST /tasks.

integration.description: When 'auto', the orchestrator invokes the integrator on success variants. When 'manual', the operator drives integration via POST /variants/{T}/integrate.
